reference: I am pregnant and I have a dermoid cyst on my left ovary. I was also told that there are some spots on the right side. I want to terminate my pregnancy, but I need to know if I remove the cyst, what are my chances of getting pregnant again. I am twenty years old, so I am very nervous and scared.
